law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Anyone who intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and with a fine of twenty-six [euros] to one hundred [euros] or with one of these punishments alone.
  In case the offender has acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and to a fine of fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].

  Art. 399. If the blows or wounds cause illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a result, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and with a fine of fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and with a fine of one hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The punishment shall be imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if the blows or wounds result in an apparently incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of the use of an organ, or a serious mutilation.
  The punishment shall be imprisonment from five years to ten years if the offender has acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with imprisonment from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person

  IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWounds: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsWithoutIntentToKill: Person -> Bool
  IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsResultingInIncurableDiseaseOrLongIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsCausingIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  ActsWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool

  liableArt401: Person -> Bool
  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  liableArt398: Person -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person:
    liableArt401(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsWithoutIntentToKill(p) & CausesDeath(p) &
      ~liableArt400(p) & ~liableArt399(p) & ~liableArt398(p).
  
  !p in Person:
    liableArt400(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsResultingInIncurableDiseaseOrLongIncapacity(p) &
      ~liableArt401(p) & 
      ~liableArt399(p) & ~liableArt398(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt399(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWoundsCausingIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~liableArt400(p) & ~liableArt401(p) & ~liableArt398(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt398(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWounds(p) &
      ~liableArt399(p) & ~liableArt400(p) & ~liableArt401(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650 <=> liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475 <=> liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730 <=> liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825 <=> liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 200 <=> liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 0 <=> liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60 <=> liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730 <=> liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180 <=> liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095 <=> liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 100 <=> liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8 <=> liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180 <=> liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 26 <=> liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 100 <=> liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30 <=> liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365 <=> liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p).
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work in the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and deliberately hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and must stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause an incurable disease or loss of an organ.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not liable under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
No. Jan is not liable under Article 399. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: imprisonmentMinDays: No model exists (theory is unsatisfiable).
